status: newly frozen post-hoc analysis of archived and previously inspected representations; no option-free graph output inspected before freeze
scientific_question: Before an answer vocabulary is supplied, do Gemma states place different material cases with the same signed physical consequence nearer to one another than cases with the opposite consequence?
primary_endpoints: checkpoint Jacobian-ensemble 38--92% band full-candidate pairwise ROC-AUC
secondary_endpoints: word and character TF-IDF of option-free stems

null.construction: within each family choose two of four cases as positive; anchor and paraphrase agree; counterfactual flips

interpretation_rule.strong: both graph precision and full-candidate AUC have exact p <= 0.05, AUC > 0.5, and at least 4/6 family AUCs exceed 0.5
interpretation_rule.partial: exactly one primary endpoint passes, or both pass but fewer than 4/6 family AUCs exceed 0.5
interpretation_rule.jacobian_specific: paired two-stage 95% interval for Jacobian-minus-direct family contrast excludes zero positively

bootstrap.unit: resample six families, then source queries within selected family

guardrails: checkpoint has seen the full scientific question and common marker but no answer word, mapping, or response instruction
all prompts, layers, families, fits, edges, and negative results retained
no literal chain-of-thought, consciousness, complete ontology, or causal-use claim
